name: Bacon-Wrapped Little Loaves
recipeIngredient: 6 Thin Slices Bacon, Cut in Half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine all ingredients except bacon in a bowl.
3. Form the mixture into 6 small loaves.
4. Place 2 half slices of bacon crisscrossed across each loaf and tuck ends under.
5. Put loaves on a rack in a shallow baking pan.
6. Bake uncovered for 50 minutes.
7. Allow to rest for 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
